tasks.subject: Task 0: Project scaffold & tooling
tasks.description: Scaffold Vite+React+TS, Tailwind v4, shadcn/ui, Vitest+RTL, git init, move resume to public/resume.pdf. Verify: npm run test && npm run build.

tasks.subject: Task 1: Theme tokens (CSS variables)
tasks.description: themes.css with [data-theme=default]/[data-theme=lego] CSS vars + @theme mapping; body uses vars; html default theme. Verify: npm run build.

tasks.subject: Task 2: ThemeProvider, useTheme, persistence
tasks.description: useTheme.ts (Theme, THEME_STORAGE_KEY=portfolio-theme, context guard, isTheme); ThemeProvider with localStorage persistence + data-theme attribute + fallback; wrap App. Verify: npm run test src/theme/ThemeProvider.test.tsx.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Pre-paint anti-FOUC script
tasks.description: Inline head IIFE reads localStorage portfolio-theme, sets data-theme before paint. Verify: manual reload, no flash.

tasks.subject: Task 4: ThemeToggle control
tasks.description: Nav button using useTheme; aria-pressed + aria-label; lucide icons. Verify: npm run test src/theme/ThemeToggle.test.tsx.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Content model & data files
tasks.description: types.ts (BuildKey, Profile/Project/Role/Skill, BUILD_KEYS); profile/projects/experience/skills data; content.test.ts. Verify: npm run test src/content/content.test.ts.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Lego SVG primitives
tasks.description: Stud, Brick (color/studs/shade helper, aria-hidden), Minifigure SVGs. Verify: npm run test src/lego/lego.test.tsx.

tasks.subject: Task 7: Lego builds & registry
tasks.description: LegoComputer/LegoPhone/BrickLogo/BrickStack builds + registry getBuild(key) with BrickStack fallback. Verify: npm run test src/lego/registry.test.tsx.

tasks.subject: Task 8: DecorationLayer
tasks.description: Lego-only decorative brick/minifig layer; null in default; aria-hidden + pointer-events-none; hidden sm:block. Verify: npm run test src/components/DecorationLayer.test.tsx.

tasks.subject: Task 9: App shell — Nav, Section, smooth scroll
tasks.description: Nav (sticky, anchors, ThemeToggle); Section wrapper (id, DecorationLayer, relative); smooth scroll. Verify: npm run test src/components/Section.test.tsx.

tasks.subject: Task 10: Hero section
tasks.description: Hero from profile: role label, name, tagline, View work/Contact CTAs. Verify: npm run test src/sections/Hero.test.tsx.

tasks.subject: Task 11: About section
tasks.description: About heading + profile.bio. Verify: npm run test src/sections/About.test.tsx.

tasks.subject: Task 12: Projects section & ProjectCard
tasks.description: ProjectCard (getBuild + name/blurb/tags/links); Projects grid from data. Verify: npm run test src/components/ProjectCard.test.tsx.

tasks.subject: Task 13: Experience section & RoleCard
tasks.description: RoleCard (build + company/title/period/summary); Experience with résumé download → /resume.pdf. Verify: npm run test src/sections/Experience.test.tsx.

tasks.subject: Task 14: Skills section
tasks.description: Skills grouped by category from data. Verify: npm run test src/sections/Skills.test.tsx.

tasks.subject: Task 15: Contact section
tasks.description: Contact mailto + GitHub/LinkedIn links from profile.socials. Verify: npm run test src/sections/Contact.test.tsx.

tasks.subject: Task 16: Accessibility, responsiveness & integration polish
tasks.description: vitest-axe; integration test both themes render all section headings + no axe violations; manual contrast/mobile check. Verify: npm run test src/App.integration.test.tsx && npm run build.
